RISC-V Integrated Matrix Extension

GitHub Pages publishes the latest HTML snapshots from this repository. Use the links below to open the generated specifications and normative-rule outputs.

Unprivileged Snapshot Latest generated HTML for the unprivileged specification. Privileged Snapshot Latest generated HTML for the privileged specification. Normative Rules HTML and JSON outputs for the repository's normative rules.

Repository: riscv/integrated-matrix-extension
